body_storage_policy: public package source bodies are exercised in place by the organ acceptance command; this manifest binds their provenance and digest relation so old metadata cannot promote the organ by itself
receipt_body_policy: receipts are evidence outputs only and are not counted as imported body substrate
source_open_payload_boundary: non-secret Microcosm package source only; no provider state, credentials, sessions, raw private state, or release authority

modules.source_role: Organ wrapper that surfaces the metabolism_runtime capsule as a first-class organ: loads bounded fixture cases, drives the capsule's real evaluate_case over a transient temp scratch root, separates positive (clean compute, no reconciliation defect) from negative (planted inconsistency rejected by the reconciler with an expected rule marker), and emits body-free result/board/validation/acceptance receipts plus CLI dispatch. Imports only from microcosm_core.engine_room.metabolism_runtime and microcosm_core.receipts.

Public-safe Engine Room metabolism capsule: a synthetic SQLite durable job queue with active-idempotency uniqueness guard, lease claim and expired-lease recovery, a blackboard claim-event ledger with active-claim projection (contradiction invalidates assertion), and a cold-start reconciliation pass that flags job/run/log inconsistencies for operator review under a small named rule taxonomy. Stdlib-only over a temp store; ships no live private runtime.
required_anchors: Public-safe metabolism runtime and reconciler capsule.
